question:
168.) What is the key difference between an availability zone and an edge location?

A. An availability zone is a grouping of AWS resources om a specific region; an edge location is a specific resource within the AWS region.
B. An availability zone is an Amazon resource within an AWS region, whereas an edge location will deliver cached content to the content to the closest location to reduce latency.
C. Edge locations are used as control stations for AWS resources
D. None of the above
